methods.name: IMPACT World+ 2.2.1
methods.long_description: Midpoint, expert and footprint versions. Covers ~18 midpoint categories with regionalized characterisation factors. CIRAIG.
methods.citation: Bulle, C., et al. (2019). IMPACT World+: a globally regionalized life cycle impact assessment method. Int J Life Cycle Assess 24, 1653-1674.

methods.name: LC-IMPACT
methods.description: GLAM-aligned damage method — Verones et al. (2020)
methods.long_description: Global non-regionalized variant of LC-IMPACT. 22 methods across climate, land use, particulate matter, and water. Installed via the bw2_lcimpact package by Chris Mutel.
methods.citation: Verones, F., et al. (2020). LC-IMPACT: A regionalized life cycle damage assessment method. Journal of Industrial Ecology 24(6), 1201-1219.
methods.notes: Requires internet + pip at install time. First install downloads the Python package (~1 MB). Last released 2022-04 — biosphere flow remapping may be required for newer biosphere3 versions.
